acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Top-level `madobectl` usage includes the `video-smoke` command entry point without running sender or receiver logic.
Parser and usage tests cover unknown top-level commands and the video-smoke usage surface.
Existing display and hello behavior remains unchanged.
Rust and repo hygiene checks pass.
No product runtime, capture, encode, transport, decode, render, presentation, cross-device, or latency claim is made.

realWorldValidation.evidence: CLI usage text and usage-error tests only; targeted Rust tests and `just check` passed.
